title: Ghent, East Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ghent, East Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ghent is a city in East Flanders with a population of 265,000. A charming medieval city with picturesque canals, a vibrant student population, and a thriving cultural and culinary scene.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
